name: Test Patterns
systemPrompt: You are a task manager that demonstrates testable agent patterns.
greeting: Hey, I'm your task manager. Try adding a task.
sttPrompt: Task management: add task, complete task, list tasks, save note, delete note

toolSchemas.name: add_task
toolSchemas.description: Add a new task to the list

toolSchemas.name: check_env
toolSchemas.description: Check if an environment variable is set

toolSchemas.name: delete_note
toolSchemas.description: Delete a note from persistent KV storage

toolSchemas.name: get_owner
toolSchemas.description: Get the session owner from KV storage

toolSchemas.name: list_tasks
toolSchemas.description: List all tasks with their status

toolSchemas.name: load_note
toolSchemas.description: Load a note from persistent KV storage

toolSchemas.name: save_note
toolSchemas.description: Save a note to persistent KV storage with optional TTL
